details.question: Select the synonym of "ABANDON":
details.explanation: To abandon means to leave behind or run away from. "Forsake" is a direct synonym.

details.question: The sum of ages of 5 children born at the intervals of 3 years each is 50 years. What is the age of the youngest child?
details.explanation: Let the ages be x, x+3, x+6, x+9, x+12. Sum = 5x + 30 = 50. 5x = 20, so x = 4.

details.question: Choose the word which is the exact OPPOSITE of the word 'ENORMOUS':
details.explanation: Enormous means very large in size. Tiny means very small.

details.question: Which data structure is typically used to implement a priority queue?
details.explanation: A heap (min-heap or max-heap) provides efficient O(log n) insertions and deletions, making it ideal for priority queues.

details.question: Look at this series: 2, 1, (1/2), (1/4), ... What number should come next?
details.explanation: This is a simple division series; each number is one-half of the previous number. 1/4 divided by 2 is 1/8.

details.explanation: Let the ages be x, x+3, x+6, x+9, x+12. Sum = 5x + 30 = 50. 5x = 20, so x = 4.

details.question: Which data structure is typically used to implement a priority queue?

details.question: Look at this series: 2, 1, (1/2), (1/4), ... What number should come next?

details.question: A train 125 m long passes a man, running at 5 km/hr in the same direction in which the train is going, in 10 seconds. What is the speed of the train?
details.explanation: Speed of the train relative to man = 125/10 m/sec = 12.5 m/sec = 12.5 * 18/5 km/hr = 45 km/hr. Let speed of train be x. Relative speed = x - 5 = 45. Hence, x = 50 km/hr.

details.question: If 20% of a = b, then b% of 20 is the same as:
Which of the following sorting algorithms has the best worst-case time complexity?
details.explanation: Merge Sort has a worst-case time complexity of O(n log n), while Quick Sort has O(n^2) and Bubble/Insertion have O(n^2).

details.question: A train 125 m long passes a man, running at 5 km/hr in the same direction in which the train is going, in 10 seconds. What is the speed of the train?
details.explanation: Speed of the train relative to man = 125/10 m/sec = 12.5 m/sec = 12.5 * 18/5 km/hr = 45 km/hr. Let speed of train be x. Relative speed = x - 5 = 45. Hence, x = 50 km/hr.

details.question: If 20% of a = b, then b% of 20 is the same as:
SCD, TEF, UGH, ____, WKL
details.explanation: First letters: S, T, U, V, W. Second letters: C, E, G, I, K. Third letters: D, F, H, J, L. Result is VIJ.
